visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long hair tied back, wearing a black and white striped shirt and green overall dress, stands in a bright, modern kitchen. She gestures toward the camera with her right hand while several off-white plastic kitchen containers sit on the white countertop in front of her. The background features white tiled walls, wooden shelving with plants and decorative items, and a stainless steel sink. (2) A split-screen montage displays four different kitchen activities: pouring oil from a glass dispenser, filling a white mug-like container with water, cracking an egg into a dual-compartment rectangular container, and showing a closed oval dish. (3) The woman returns to the frame, holding the mug-like container and gesturing as she speaks. The lighting is bright and even. (4) Close-up shots follow: she pours rice from a plastic bag into the container, rinses it under a faucet, and places it inside a microwave. (5) She opens the microwave and brings the container to the counter, revealing perfectly cooked white rice inside. She tastes the rice with pink chopsticks, smiling and nodding. (6) In another sequence, she cracks eggs into a tan rectangular container, whisks them with chopsticks, adds seasoning from a small spoon, and puts it in the microwave. After cooking, she slices the yellow egg roll on a wooden cutting board. (7) Broccoli and green beans are placed in an oval steamer, water is added, and it is microwaved. She retrieves the steaming container with a surprised, happy expression. (8) She demonstrates a glass oil bottle, showing how it can both spray and pour oil into a black frying pan. (9) Raw beef slices are placed in the oval container, seasoned, and microwaved. (10) The final scene shows her meticulously assembling a bento box with the cooked rice, beef, eggs, and vegetables using chopsticks. She presents the finished colorful meal to the camera with a satisfied smile.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 3COINS 好物分享. [Subtitle]: 很多人說我沒時間煮. (2) [Subtitle]: 怎麼辦呢. [Subtitle]: 最近發現日本有很多這種很方便的小物. [Subtitle]: 那今天來用給大家看. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們只要一台微波爐. [Subtitle]: 然後跟這些器具. [Subtitle]: 就可以快速出便當. (4) [Subtitle]: 煮飯碗. [Subtitle]: 玉子燒. [Subtitle]: 想要煮菜、煎魚. [Subtitle]: 微波爐全部丟進去微波就可以了. (5) [Variety]: 加米. [Variety]: 加水. [Variety]: 洗米. [Variety]: 倒水. [Variety]: 再加飲用水. [Variety]: 浸泡. [Variety]: 微波. (6) [Subtitle]: 飯好了. (7) [Subtitle]: 嗯～～可以. (8) [Variety]: 上層取出. [Variety]: 打蛋. [Variety]: 攪拌. [Variety]: 調味. [Variety]: 微波. (9) [Variety]: 取出壓蓋上層靜至五分鐘. [Variety]: 成形. [Variety]: 切片完成. (10) [Variety]: 清洗後放入. [Variety]: 加點水. [Variety]: 蓋上蓋子. [Variety]: 進去微波. [Variety]: 小心燙手. [Variety]: 完成. (11) [Slogan]: 好物推薦 噴倒兩用油罐. [Subtitle]: 發現這個油罐超級方便喔. (12) [Subtitle]: 因為一般我們會買那個噴的油. [Subtitle]: 那有時候又想要多用一點又想用倒的. [Subtitle]: 怎麼辦. [Subtitle]: 這個一罐搞定. (13) [Subtitle]: 可以噴、可以倒. [Subtitle]: 你要煎個蛋可以用噴的. (14) [Variety]: (煎蛋沒問題). [Variety]: 繼續微波料理. (15) [Variety]: 調味. [Variety]: 一樣蓋蓋子. [Variety]: 完成. [Variety]: 好吃. (16) [Variety]: 擺盤擺盤擺盤擺盤. [Subtitle]: 只有微波爐也可以煮出超可愛便當.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied in a ponytail, wearing a black and white horizontally striped t-shirt under a white and green apron/overall dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern domestic kitchen with white tiled walls, white countertops, and wooden cabinetry. Shelves hold small potted plants (pothos), decorative bottles, and wooden boxes. A stainless steel sink and various kitchen appliances are visible.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic synthesizer music plays. A woman's voice is high-pitched and energetic, speaking rapidly in Mandarin. (2) A quick 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the visuals transition to the collage. (3) Sound of rushing water from a faucet occurs while the speaker continues her enthusiastic narration. (4) A percussive 'click' and a hollow 'thud' are heard as the rice container is placed on the counter. (5) A digital 'beep' from a microwave sounds, followed by the sound of opening a heavy door. (6) A sharp 'crack' sound occurs as an egg hits the plastic container rim. (7) Rhythmic 'swishing' sounds of chopsticks whisking eggs against plastic. (8) A metallic 'tink' sound when a spoon hits the container edge. (9) A crisp chopping sound on wood as the egg roll is sliced. (10) A high-pitched 'ting' bell sound effect signals a completion phase. (11) A distinct 'shhh' spraying sound is heard as oil is dispensed from the bottle. (12) The music continues steadily with a driving electronic beat. (13) Sounds of light rustling and the woman making an appreciative eating sound ('Mmm'). (14) The audio ends with a bright final synthesizer chord and the woman's voice trailing off with a cheerful closing statement.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem -> Solution Introduction -> Product 1 Demo -> Product 2 Demo -> Product 3 Demo -> Final Result Integration -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote specific 3COINS kitchen tools by demonstrating their efficiency and ease of use in preparing a complete bento meal using only a microwave, targeting busy individuals who lack time for traditional cooking.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The top banner explicitly mentions the brand name, and the entire video is dedicated to showcasing the brand's specific products with a recommendation tone.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media format with fast cuts and bright text overlays to maintain viewer attention. The integration of various kitchen gadgets into a single task (bento making) effectively proves product utility.
